phase3_findings.description: F1 (shadow-promoted, corroborated x3): item-6a discriminated PR-vs-current-branch mode on `test -n ${PR_BASE_BRANCH:-}` while the prose only instructs carrying $HEAD_OVERRIDE_BASE; a carried-operand-but-unthreaded-signal run silently fell to the current-branch base, bypassing the exit-65 guard. Restructured to operand-first (key on $HEAD_OVERRIDE_BASE); PR_BASE_BRANCH now only gates the fail-closed exit-65.

Sug1: #363 head-count label carried a stale copy-paste clause ('comment fetch ... NOT a tee ... gh exit status survives') misdescribing the #503 producer. Replaced with an accurate description (>-redirect candidates + awk/sed filter + cat publish, no tee head).

rows: UNRESOLVABLE	R3	.changeset/issue-503-diff-base-fix.md	6	count-locked: '3 item' claim but no adjacent assertion block (informational, never gates)

skipped_checks.reason: working tree dirty at the pre-commit suite run (grades committed HEAD); item-6a pre-check ran clean on committed HEAD (rc 0); committed-tree confirming run clears the skip

phase3_findings.description: docs/DEVFLOW_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md:60 attributes the merge-base/--unshallow cleanup to 'Phase 0.2's cache producer', but that cleanup lives in the sibling base-resolution fence (both in Phase 0.2). Net behavior described is correct; only the attribution is slightly off.

$BASE in the retargeting-divergence check (review/SKILL.md:383) is a cross-fence read; if unthreaded it misfires a spurious warning. Cosmetic only (diff base is $HEAD_OVERRIDE_BASE, unaffected); matches the established carry-the-value convention. Parked since iter-1.

item-6a both-unthreaded residual: if a PR-mode iteration threads NEITHER $HEAD_OVERRIDE_BASE nor $PR_BASE_BRANCH, the else arm resolves the current-branch config base. All agree this is strictly better than the prior ${PR_BASE_SHA:-origin/main} form, documented, and backstopped by Phase 0.6 — the irreducible carry-nothing residual, not a defect.

Minor test-hardening gaps (sev 2-4): no end-to-end fence→real-git-diff thread (A), legitimate empty-but-successful producer run untested (B), no standalone-mode negative test (C), user-facing prose unpinned (D). None leaves a changed behavior fully untested; follow-up hardening.

post_shadow_edit_gate.delta: final Loop-Exit base merge (origin/main, 10 commits) + run.sh #484-region conflict resolution deferring to main's already-merged #506 (repoint pins to CHANGELOG.md) instead of this branch's superseded iter-1 branch-hygiene edit, plus a 2-line explanatory comment
post_shadow_edit_gate.note: post-shadow PR-authored delta is a test-harness comment resolution deferring to an already-reviewed main PR; suite green (7936 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped)

park_calibration_gate: clean: no parked finding matched a mis-grade shape (fail-open guard on inputs it should catch / coverage hole hiding a defect / overclaiming breadcrumb / un-honorable deferral). Parked: $BASE cross-fence over-warn (fails safe), item-6a both-unthreaded residual (strictly-better, documented, Phase-0.6-backstopped), docs:60 attribution nit (net behavior correct), minor test-hardening gaps (empty-success path confirmed correct).
